utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh , and I can also speak a little French . Voulez ... vous coucher avec moi ce soir ? Why ? What did I say ?

emotion_cause.span: 1_I can also speak a little French .

utterances.speaker: Mischa
utterances.text: Well , you just asked if I wanted to go to bed with you tonight .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh my God ! No wonder I get such great service at Cafe Maurice .

emotion_cause.span: 2_you just asked if I wanted to go to bed with you tonight

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Knock , knock , knock , knock , hi .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Um , could you please tell Sergei that um , I was fascinated by what Boutros Boutros Gali said in the New York Times .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: You did not say Boutros Boutros Gali .

utterances.speaker: Mischa
utterances.text: Boutros Boutros Gali .

utterances.speaker: Mischa
utterances.text: He says he was too .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Interesting .

utterances.speaker: Mischa
utterances.text: So I was wondering ...

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Okay , ah , before you get all talky again , umm , could you also please tell Sergei that I really like his suit .

utterances.speaker: Mischa
utterances.text: Eh , he said , thank you very much , he thinks you look very pretty tonight , your hair , golden like the sun .

emotion_cause.span: 12_he thinks you look very pretty tonight , your hair , golden like the sun .

utterances.speaker: Mischa
utterances.text: So you are a chef ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I am also thinking about opening up my own restaurant .

emotion_cause.span: 14_I am also thinking about opening up my own restaurant .

utterances.speaker: Mischa
utterances.text: Oh , really .

emotion_cause.span: 14_I am also thinking about opening up my own restaurant .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Monica , can I talk to you behind my menu , please . What are you doing ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Well , I was having a conversation .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Yeah but , Mischa is so interested in you , that Sergei and I have not been able to say two words to each other .

emotion_cause.span: 18_Mischa is so interested in you , that Sergei and I have not been able to say two words to each other .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: What do you want me to do ? Just sit here silently while you three have a conversation ?

emotion_cause.span: 19_What do you want me to do ? Just sit here silently while you three have a conversation ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: That would be great . Thank you .
